Test whether an R value can round-trip through JuliaConnectoR

Source: R/run.R
dot-is_sendable_to_julia.Rd

JuliaConnectoR fails to serialise NULL, NA scalars, and zero-length character vectors. This helper returns FALSE for these, TRUE otherwise.

Usage

.is_sendable_to_julia(v)

Developed by Shinichi Nakagawa.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
